other_observers: Steve Mlodinow first identified the bird, and both Nick Moore and I observed it on the 13th; I had seen a reddish Swainson's but Steve positively identified it for me
specific_location: back yard of the farm house at 24247 Hwy 287, Lamar,CO
description: -Swainson's Thrush with the typical spectacles -had rufous flanks instead of the olive flanks -rufous tinged back instead of the grayish backBehaviors: foraged under the pines, around the rock walls, and occassionally out in the lawnCall: did not hearPlumage: adult
